title: The Business Case for AI Assistants in 2028
excerpt: EXCERPT: By 2028, AI assistants will transform from novelty to necessity, delivering $4.4 trillion in business value across industries.
content:
EXCERPT:
By 2028, AI assistants will transform from novelty to necessity, delivering $4.4 trillion in business value across industries. This deep dive explores how next-generation AI platforms will revolutionize operations, customer service, and decision-making. From predictive analytics that slash inventory costs to AI agents that handle 85% of routine customer interactions, discover the concrete ways businesses will leverage AI to gain competitive advantage in the near future.
